events.label: New Message
events.description: Triggered when a new message is received (text, photo, video, document, sticker, etc.)

events.label: Edited Message
events.description: Triggered when a previously sent message is edited by the sender

events.label: Channel Post
events.description: Triggered when a new post is published in a channel where the bot is a member

events.label: Edited Channel Post
events.description: Triggered when a channel post is edited

events.label: Callback Query
events.description: Triggered when a user clicks an inline keyboard button. Contains the button's callback data.

events.label: Inline Query
events.description: Triggered when a user types @botname in any chat. Used for inline mode responses.

events.label: Chosen Inline Result
events.description: Triggered when the user selects a result from an inline query response

events.label: Message Reaction
events.description: Triggered when a user adds or removes a reaction to a message

events.label: Reaction Count Changed
events.description: Triggered when the anonymous reaction count on a message changes

events.label: Bot Status Changed
events.description: Triggered when the bot's membership status changes (added to group, removed, promoted, restricted)

events.label: Member Status Changed
events.description: Triggered when another chat member's status changes (joined, left, promoted, restricted)

events.label: Join Request
events.description: Triggered when a user sends a join request to a chat where the bot can approve members

events.label: Chat Boost
events.description: Triggered when a chat receives a new boost or an existing boost is changed

events.label: Boost Removed
events.description: Triggered when a boost is removed from a chat

events.label: Shipping Query
events.description: Triggered when a user needs to provide shipping information during a Telegram Payment flow

events.label: Pre-Checkout Query
events.description: Triggered before a payment is finalized. The bot must confirm or reject within 10 seconds.

events.label: Paid Media Purchased
events.description: Triggered when a user purchases paid media content sent by the bot

events.label: Poll Updated
events.description: Triggered when a poll's state changes (new votes, poll closed). Only for polls sent by the bot.

events.label: Poll Answer
events.description: Triggered when a user votes or changes their vote in a non-anonymous poll

events.label: Business Connection
events.description: Triggered when the bot is connected to or disconnected from a Telegram Business account

events.label: Business Message
events.description: Triggered when a message is received through a connected Telegram Business account

events.label: Edited Business Message
events.description: Triggered when a business account message is edited

events.label: Business Messages Deleted
events.description: Triggered when messages from a connected business account are deleted

categories.label: Messages
categories.description: New messages, edits, and channel posts

categories.label: Interactions
categories.description: Button clicks, inline queries, and reactions

categories.label: Members & Groups
categories.description: Member status changes, join requests, and boosts

categories.label: Polls
categories.description: Poll state changes and vote tracking
